testsuite.name: HomePage Assertion

testcase.name: test login successful with valid credentials redirects to home page

failure.message: Testing if the URL contains 'UserHome/Index' in 5000ms - expected "contains 'UserHome/Index'" but got: "https://apps.zappdev.io/MemoryLite_906_isabellamftr/SignInPage/Load" (5372ms)

error.message: Testing if the URL contains [33m'UserHome/Index'[39m in 5000ms - expected [32m"contains 'UserHome/Index'"[39m but got: [31m"https://apps.zappdev.io/MemoryLite_906_isabellamftr/SignInPage/Load"[39m [90m(5372ms)[39m

testcase.name: test login unsuccessful with invalid credentials
test unauthorised users on the userhome page are redirected to the sign in page
test unauthorised users on the add entry page are redirected to the sign in page
